field_values.action_summary: Under cover of night, John Carter leads a small group to infiltrate Zodanga. They scale the massive carborundum walls using a human ladder. Carter successfully enters the palace grounds and begins coordinating the silent takeover of the city gates.
field_values.emotional_beat: Stealth/Tension $\rightarrow$ High Stakes Action $\rightarrow$ Calculated Control.
field_values.camera_intent: Night photography with high contrast (shadows vs. moonlight); Vertical tracking shots of wall scaling; Close-ups on Carter's face for focus/stealth; POV shots from wall tops looking down into city
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Height scale of carborundum walls relative to characters
Physical placement and stability of the human ladder elements
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH024_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes night infiltration of Zodanga. The sequence requires precise coordination between human and Thark actors to simulate the scaling of massive carborundum walls via a human ladder, transitioning from stealthy tension into controlled tactical movement within the palace grounds.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Small Group of Tharks

## Required Environments
- zodanga_walled_city (The Walls/Palace Grounds)

## Continuity Constraints
- Moonlight direction and shadow consistency
- Height scale of carborundum walls relative to characters
- Physical placement and stability of the human ladder elements

## Beat List
- BT001: Formation of the human ladder at the wall base
- BT002: The vertical ascent and infiltration
- BT003: Establishing control within palace grounds
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
